title: H2O Wave Hindcast Resource Characterization Cache
subtitle: Warmed sea-state cache for the DOE H2O wave hindcast notebook
description:
Companion dataset for the U.S. DOE H2O Wave Hindcast resource characterization notebook.

Contents:

- `mer_wave_cache/` - the us-marine-energy-resource package's download cache: 3-hour bulk-parameter sea-state records (Hm0, Te, J, Dir, Tp) for eight U.S. marine energy test sites over 2016-2020, fetched from the public `wpto-pds-us-wave` bucket on AWS S3. The notebook copies it to a writable directory and points MER_WAVE_CACHE_DIR at it.
- `cache/` - derived results: precomputed environmental contours, site depths and representative-extreme fits. These exist purely so the notebook runs in minutes instead of hours.
- `h2o_examples/` - the small mapping and site-definition helpers the notebook imports.

Source data: WPTO U.S. Wave Hindcast, produced by the U.S. Department of Energy Water Power Technologies Office and distributed as an AWS Open Data registry dataset (`s3://wpto-pds-us-wave`). U.S. Government work, public domain.

The notebook re-fetches anything missing via the us-marine-energy-resource package (pip install us-marine-energy-resource), so this dataset is an accelerator, not a requirement.
